positive: Minimalist geometric jungle silhouette, featuring stylized tropical leaves (monstera, palm fronds, ferns) interspersed with abstract celestial elements like crescent moons and glowing orbs. The composition must be symmetrical and circular, centered on a delicate, stylized vine motif. Style: Clean line art and solid black silhouette against a crisp, off-white background. Color direction: Monochromatic black on beige/cream, with selective pop of vibrant emerald green for accents. Composition: Ideal for repetition on fabric, highly scalable, emphasizing negative space and strong contrast. Suitable for apparel printing.
negative: blur, low detail, artifacts, watermark, text, logo, signature, dirty, grainy, noise, complex anatomy, realistic photography, messy, colored background, gradients, sketch, oil painting
